signup_page.title: Sign Up
signup_page.subtitle: Complete the following information to create your account.

messages.email_hint: Enter your email address so we can contact you. We will send you a message to confirm your account after registration.
messages.password_hint: Your password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.
messages.selected_university: Please make sure your selected university is correct: {{university}}, as it is a core part of your information and an incorrect choice may affect your account.
messages.account_created_successfully: The account has been successfully created. Please check your email to confirm the account.
messages.account_creation_failed: Failed to create the account. Please try again later.

login_page.title: Login
login_page.subtitle: Enter your account details to easily access your university services.

messages.account_verified_successfully: Your account has been verified successfully.
messages.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
messages.email_not_verified: Your email is not verified. Please check your inbox to verify your account.
messages.activation_success: Your account has been activated successfully.
messages.activation_expired: The activation link has expired. Please request a new one.

choose_uni_page.title: Choose your university
choose_uni_page.subtitle: Please select the university you belong to in order to complete the account creation process.
choose_uni_page.warning_message: You must choose the university you belong to.

forgot_pass_page.title: Did you forget your password?
forgot_pass_page.subtitle: Enter your registered email address to receive the OTP.
forgot_pass_page.button: Send the OTP code to your email address

messages.email_invalid_retype: The email you entered is invalid or contains an issue. Please retype your email.
messages.otp_sent_successfully: The verification code (OTP) has been sent successfully.
messages.email_not_found: This email address was not found.

reset_pass_page.title: Reset password
reset_pass_page.subtitle: Please enter a new password to secure your account.

messages.password_reset_successfully: Your password has been reset successfully.

otp_page.title: The OTP has been sent to your email
otp_page.subtitle: Please enter the 6-digit code to verify your account.

messages.otp_invalid_retype: The verification code you entered is invalid. Please retype the OTP.
messages.verified_successfully: Your code has been verified successfully.
messages.expired: The verification code has expired. Please click the resend button to receive a new one.

hero_section.slogan: “Where your university journey feels like home.” 🏡

resend_verification.title: Resend Verification Email
resend_verification.description: We’ll resend the verification email for “{{email}}“.
resend_verification.instruction: If you didn’t receive the email or it expired, click the Resend button below to send it again.

messages.sent_successfully: Verification email has been sent successfully.
messages.email_not_found: This email address was not found.
